name: Shepherd of Bethlehem
oracleText:
Vigilance
When Shepherd of Bethlehem enters the battlefield, create a 1/1 white Sheep creature token.
flavorText: "Fear not: for behold, I bring you good tidings of great joy." — Luke 2:10
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; mechanics, colors, and art sourcing remain pending. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses Giorgione's "The Adoration of the Shepherds" via Wikimedia Commons. First-pass mechanics added in this pass; mana, colors, and rules text remain provisional.

classics.license: CC0 reproduction of a public-domain work via the National Gallery of Art Commons file.
classics.creditText: Giorgione, The Adoration of the Shepherds
classics.sourceNotes: A high-quality Nativity shepherd scene gives the Bethlehem shepherd card the right sacred, monumental tone.
